synopsis: "The Battle of Cadinth" is a short story written by Bill Smith. It was first published in Star Wars Galaxy #2 by Topps in Winter 1995. It takes place 6 ABY, and also features roleplaying game stats for various droids and vehicles to use the story in a role-playing game. On February 23, 2007, the story was published on Hyperspace. The story features droids and vehicles based on concepts created by Kenner for a proposed toy line set after Return of the Jedi called The Epic Continues, which was ultimately rejected by Lucasfilm. title: The Battle of Cadinth
